Group_1_Success_Index.description: Managerial success indexes (100-point scale) for Group 1 managers who engage in a high volume of interactions with people outside their work unit; n1 = 12. Compared with Group_2_Success_Index for estimating the mean difference.

Group_2_Success_Index.description: Managerial success indexes (100-point scale) for Group 2 managers who rarely interact with people outside their work unit; n2 = 15. Compared with Group_1_Success_Index for estimating the mean difference.
